creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sun Aug  5 06:26:41 2012
New Revision: 302071
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302071

Log:
  Pillow is the "friendly" PIL fork. PIL is the Python Imaging Library. Pillow
  was started for and is currently maintained by the Plone community. But it is
  used by many other folks in the Python web community.
  
  WWW:	http://github.com/collective/Pillow
  
  PR:		ports/168750
  Submitted by:	koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>

Added:
  head/graphics/py-pillow/
  head/graphics/py-pillow/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/py-pillow/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/py-pillow/files/
  head/graphics/py-pillow/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/py-pillow/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/graphics/py-pillow/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/graphics/Makefile

Modified: head/graphics/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 06:22:23 2012	(r302070)
+++ head/graphics/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 06:26:41 2012	(r302071)
@@ -824,6 +824,7 @@
     SUBDIR += py-opengl
     SUBDIR += py-openimageio
     SUBDIR += py-paint
+    SUBDIR += py-pillow
     SUBDIR += py-png
     SUBDIR += py-poppler
     SUBDIR += py-pycha

Added: head/graphics/py-pillow/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/graphics/py-pillow/Makefile	Sun Aug  5 06:26:41 2012	(r302071)
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+# New ports collection makefile for:	py-pillow
+# Date created:		2012-05-28
+# Whom:			koobs <koobs.freebsd@gmail.com>
+#
+# $FreeBSD$
+#
+
+PORTNAME=	pillow
+PORTVERSION=	1.7.7
+CATEGORIES=	graphics python
+MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
+DISTNAME=	${PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
+
+MAINTAINER=	koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Fork of the Python Imaging Library (PIL)
+
+LIB_DEPENDS=	jpeg:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/jpeg \
+		freetype:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
+
+CONFLICTS_INSTALL=	py*-imaging-*
+
+USE_ZIP=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	Pillow
+PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/graphics/py-pillow/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/graphics/py-pillow/distinfo	Sun Aug  5 06:26:41 2012	(r302071)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (Pillow-1.7.7.zip) = 4e9a17d62bc221ed932a3bccdf710331f014e0432b61e91e7222b7c93e91de48
+SIZE (Pillow-1.7.7.zip) = 725157

Added: head/graphics/py-pillow/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/graphics/py-pillow/files/patch-setup.py	Sun Aug  5 06:26:41 2012	(r302071)
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+--- ./setup.py.orig	2012-05-28 18:52:42.000000000 +1000
++++ ./setup.py	2012-05-28 18:55:45.000000000 +1000
+@@ -134,7 +134,12 @@
+         if prefix:
+             _add_directory(library_dirs, os.path.join(prefix, "lib"))
+             _add_directory(include_dirs, os.path.join(prefix, "include"))
+-
++            _add_directory(library_dirs,
++                os.path.join(os.getenv("PREFIX"), "lib"))
++            _add_directory(include_dirs,
++                os.path.join(os.getenv("PREFIX"), "include"))
++            _add_directory(include_dirs,
++                os.path.join(os.getenv("LOCALBASE"), "include"))
+         #
+         # locate tkinter libraries
+ 

Added: head/graphics/py-pillow/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/graphics/py-pillow/pkg-descr	Sun Aug  5 06:26:41 2012	(r302071)
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+Pillow is the "friendly" PIL fork. PIL is the Python Imaging Library. Pillow
+was started for and is currently maintained by the Plone community. But it is
+used by many other folks in the Python web community.
+
+WWW:	http://github.com/collective/Pillow
